option.name: --audit-level
tip: Only print advisories with severity >= level (low, moderate, high, critical).

option.name: --ignore
tip: Ignore specific CVE IDs from audit.

next.name: build
tip: Transpile and bundle one or more files.

option.name: --allow-unresolved
tip: Allow unresolved dynamic import()/require() specifiers matching these glob patterns.

option.name: --app
tip: (EXPERIMENTAL) Build a web app for production using Bun Bake.

option.name: --banner
tip: Add a banner to the bundled output such as "use client".

option.name: --compile
tip: Generate a standalone Bun executable containing your bundled code.

option.name: --compile-autoload-bunfig
tip: Enable autoloading of bunfig.toml in standalone executable (default: true).

option.name: --compile-autoload-dotenv
tip: Enable autoloading of .env files in standalone executable (default: true).

option.name: --compile-autoload-package-json
tip: Enable autoloading of package.json at runtime in standalone executable (default: false).

option.name: --compile-autoload-tsconfig
tip: Enable autoloading of tsconfig.json at runtime in standalone executable (default: false).

option.name: --compile-exec-argv
tip: Prepend arguments to the standalone executable's execArgv.

option.name: --compile-executable-path
tip: Path to a Bun executable to use for cross-compilation instead of downloading.

option.name: --css-chunking
tip: Chunk CSS files together to reduce duplicated CSS loaded in a browser.

option.name: --emit-dce-annotations
tip: Re-emit DCE annotations in bundles. Enabled by default unless --minify-whitespace is passed.

option.name: --entry-naming
tip: Customize entry point filenames. Defaults to "[dir]/[name].[ext]"

option.name: --env
tip: Inline environment variables into the bundle as process.env.${name}. Defaults to 'disable'.

option.name: --external
tip: Exclude module from transpilation (can use * wildcards).

option.name: --footer
tip: Add a footer to the bundled output.

option.name: --format
tip: Specifies the module format to build to.

option.name: --keep-names
tip: Preserve original function and class names when minifying.

option.name: --metafile
tip: Write a JSON file with metadata about the build.

option.name: --metafile-md
tip: Write a markdown file with a visualization of the module graph (LLM-friendly).

option.name: --no-bundle
tip: Transpile file only, do not bundle.

option.name: --no-clear-screen
tip: Disable clearing the terminal screen on reload when --watch is enabled.

option.name: --no-compile-autoload-bunfig
tip: Disable autoloading of bunfig.toml in standalone executable.

option.name: --no-compile-autoload-dotenv
tip: Disable autoloading of .env files in standalone executable.

option.name: --no-compile-autoload-package-json
tip: Disable autoloading of package.json at runtime in standalone executable.

option.name: --no-compile-autoload-tsconfig
tip: Disable autoloading of tsconfig.json at runtime in standalone executable.

option.name: --packages
tip: Add dependencies to bundle or keep them external. Defaults to "bundle".

option.name: --public-path
tip: A prefix to be appended to any import paths in bundled code.

option.name: --reject-unresolved
tip: Fail the build on any dynamic import()/require() specifier that cannot be resolved at build time.

option.name: --root
tip: Root directory used for multiple entry points.

option.name: --target
tip: The intended execution environment for the bundle.

option.name: --watch
tip: Automatically restart the process on file change.

option.name: --windows-copyright
tip: When using --compile targeting Windows, set the executable copyright.

option.name: --windows-description
tip: When using --compile targeting Windows, set the executable description.

option.name: --windows-hide-console
tip: When using --compile targeting Windows, prevent a Command prompt from opening alongside the executable.

option.name: --windows-icon
tip: When using --compile targeting Windows, assign an executable icon.

option.name: --windows-publisher
tip: When using --compile targeting Windows, set the executable company name.

option.name: --windows-title
tip: When using --compile targeting Windows, set the executable product name.

option.name: --windows-version
tip: When using --compile targeting Windows, set the executable version (e.g. 1.2.3.4).

next.name: create
tip: Create a new project from a template.

next.name: exec
tip: run build            --- Run a package.json script

option.name: --define
tip: Substitute K:V while parsing. Values are parsed as JSON.

option.name: --drop
tip: Remove function calls, e.g. --drop=console removes all console.* calls.

option.name: --feature
tip: Enable a feature flag for dead-code elimination.

option.name: --jsx-factory
tip: Changes the function called when compiling JSX elements using the classic JSX runtime.

option.name: --jsx-fragment
tip: Changes the function called when compiling JSX fragments.

option.name: --jsx-import-source
tip: Declares the module specifier to be used for importing the jsx and jsxs factory functions.

option.name: --jsx-side-effects
tip: Treat JSX elements as having side effects (disable pure annotations).

option.name: --loader
tip: Valid loaders: js, jsx, ts, tsx, json, toml, text, file, wasm, napi

option.name: --main-fields
tip: Main fields to lookup in package.json.

option.name: --no-macros
tip: Disable macros from being executed in the bundler, transpiler and runtime.

option.name: --preserve-symlinks-main
tip: Preserve symlinks when resolving the main entry point.

next.name: feedback
tip: Provide feedback to the Bun team.

option.name: --email
tip: Set the email address used for this submission.

next.name: info
tip: View package metadata from the registry.

option.name: --ca
tip: Provide a Certificate Authority signing certificate.

option.name: --cafile
tip: The same as --ca, but is a file path to the certificate.

option.name: --cpu
tip: Override CPU architecture for optional dependencies.

option.name: --lockfile-only
tip: Generate a lockfile without installing dependencies.

option.name: --minimum-release-age
tip: Only install packages published at least N seconds ago.

option.name: --network-concurrency
tip: Maximum number of concurrent network requests (default 48).

option.name: --os
tip: Override operating system for optional dependencies.

option.name: --quiet
tip: Only show tarball name when packing.

option.name: --registry
tip: Use a specific registry by default.

next.name: init
tip: Initialize a Bun project in the current directory.
Creates a package.json, tsconfig.json, and bunfig.toml if they don't exist.

tip: Analyze & install all dependencies of files passed as arguments recursively (using Bun's bundler).

tip: Maximum number of concurrent jobs for lifecycle scripts. (default 5)

option.name: --cpu
tip: Override CPU architecture for optional dependencies (e.g., x64, arm64, * for all).

tip: Add the exact version instead of the ^range

tip: Install packages for the matching workspaces.

tip: Always request the latest versions from the registry & reinstall all dependencies.

tip: Skip lifecycle scripts in the project's package.json (dependency scripts are never run).

tip: Link "bin" from a matching platform-specific "optionalDependencies" instead.

tip: print the default trusted dependencies list.

tip: Set access level for scoped packages.

next.name: repl
tip: Start a REPL session with Bun.

option.name: --eval
tip: Evaluates given code and silently exits.

option.name: --print
tip: Evaluates given code, prints result and exits.

option.name: --sloppy
tip: Runs the REPL in sloppy mode.

next.name: test
tip: Run all matching test files and print the results to stdout.

option.name: --bail
tip: Exit the test suite after <n> failures.
If you do not specify a number, it defaults to 1.

option.name: --changed
tip: Only run test files affected by changed files according to git.

option.name: --concurrent
tip: Treat all tests as test.concurrent() tests.

option.name: --coverage-dir
tip: Directory for coverage files. Defaults to "coverage".

option.name: --coverage-reporter
tip: Report coverage in "text" and/or "lcov". Defaults to "text".

option.name: --isolate
tip: Run each test file in a fresh global object. Leaked handles from one file cannot affect another.

option.name: --max-concurrency
tip: Maximum number of concurrent tests to execute at once. Default is 20.

option.name: --only
tip: Only run tests that are marked with "test.only()"

option.name: --only-failures
tip: Only display test failures, hiding passing tests.

option.name: --parallel
tip: Run test files in parallel using N worker processes. Implies --isolate. Defaults to CPU core count.

option.name: --parallel-delay
tip: Milliseconds the first --parallel worker must be busy before spawning the rest.

option.name: --pass-with-no-tests
tip: Exit with code 0 when no tests are found.

option.name: --path-ignore-patterns
tip: Glob patterns for test file paths to ignore.

option.name: --reporter-outfile
tip: Output file path for the reporter format (required with --reporter).

option.name: --rerun-each
tip: Re-run each test file <n> times, helps catch certain bugs

option.name: --retry
tip: Default retry count for all tests, overridden by per-test { retry: N }.

option.name: --seed
tip: Set the random seed for test randomization.

option.name: --shard
tip: Run a subset of test files, e.g. '--shard=1/3' runs the first of three shards.

option.name: --test-name-pattern
tip: Run only tests with a name that matches the given regex.

option.name: --timeout
tip: Set the per-test timeout in milliseconds, default is 5000.

option.name: --todo
tip: Include tests that are marked with "test.todo()"

tip: Store & load cached data from a specific directory path.

option.name: --concurrent-scripts
tip: Maximum number of concurrent jobs for lifecycle scripts (default 5)

tip: Always request the latest versions from the registry & reinstall all dependencies.

option.name: --no-verify
tip: Skip verifying integrity of newly downloaded packages.

option.name: --trust
tip: Add to trustedDependencies in the project's package.json and install the package(s).

tip: Update packages to their latest versions.

option.name: --minimum-release-age

next.name: upgrade
tip: Upgrade to latest version of Bun.

option.name: --canary
tip: Install the most recent canary version of Bun.

next.name: why
tip: Explain why a package is installed.

option.name: --depth
tip: Maximum depth of the dependency tree to display.

option.name: --top
tip: Show only the top dependency tree instead of nested ones.

next.name: x
tip: Execute an npm package executable (CLI), automatically installing into a global shared cache if not installed in node_modules.

option.name: --bun
tip: Force the command to run with Bun instead of Node.js

option.name: --revision
tip: Print version with revision and exit

global_option.name: --bun
tip: Force a script or package to use Bun's runtime instead of Node.js (via symlinking node).

global_option.name: --config
tip: Specify path to Bun config file.

global_option.name: --console-depth
tip: Set the default depth for console.log object inspection (default: 2).

global_option.name: --cpu-prof
tip: Start CPU profiler and write profile to disk on exit.

global_option.name: --cpu-prof-dir
tip: Specify the directory where the CPU profile will be saved.

global_option.name: --cpu-prof-interval
tip: Specify the sampling interval in microseconds for CPU profiling (default: 1000).

global_option.name: --cpu-prof-md
tip: Output CPU profile in markdown format (grep-friendly, designed for LLM analysis).

global_option.name: --cpu-prof-name
tip: Specify the name of the CPU profile file.

global_option.name: --cron-period
tip: Cron period for cron execution mode.

global_option.name: --cwd
tip: Absolute path to resolve files & entry points from.
This just changes the process' cwd.

global_option.name: --dns-result-order
tip: Set the default order of DNS lookup results.

global_option.name: --elide-lines
tip: Number of lines of script output shown when using --filter (default: 10). Set to 0 to show all lines.

global_option.name: --env-file
tip: Load environment variables from the specified file(s).

global_option.name: --experimental-http2-fetch
tip: Offer h2 in fetch() TLS ALPN. Same as BUN_FEATURE_FLAG_EXPERIMENTAL_HTTP2_CLIENT=1

global_option.name: --experimental-http3-fetch
tip: Honor Alt-Svc: h3 in fetch() and upgrade to HTTP/3. Same as BUN_FEATURE_FLAG_EXPERIMENTAL_HTTP3_CLIENT=1

global_option.name: --expose-gc
tip: Expose gc() on the global object. Has no effect on Bun.gc().

global_option.name: --fetch-preconnect
tip: Preconnect to a URL while code is loading.

global_option.name: --filter
tip: Run a script in all workspace packages matching the pattern.

global_option.name: --heap-prof
tip: Generate V8 heap snapshot on exit (.heapsnapshot).

global_option.name: --heap-prof-dir
tip: Specify the directory where the heap profile will be saved.

global_option.name: --heap-prof-md
tip: Generate markdown heap profile on exit (for CLI analysis).

global_option.name: --heap-prof-name
tip: Specify the name of the heap profile file.

global_option.name: --hot
tip: Enable auto reload in the Bun runtime, test runner, or bundler.

global_option.name: --if-present
tip: Exit without an error if the entrypoint does not exist.

global_option.name: --inspect-brk
tip: Activate Bun's debugger, set breakpoint on first line of code and wait.

global_option.name: --inspect-wait
tip: Activate Bun's debugger, wait for a connection before executing.

global_option.name: --max-http-header-size
tip: Set the maximum size of HTTP headers in bytes. Default is 16KiB.

global_option.name: --no-addons
tip: Throw an error if process.dlopen is called, and disable export condition "node-addons".

global_option.name: --no-clear-screen
tip: Disable clearing the terminal screen on reload when --hot or --watch is enabled.

global_option.name: --no-deprecation
tip: Suppress all reporting of the custom deprecation.

global_option.name: --no-exit-on-error
tip: Continue running other scripts when one fails (with --parallel/--sequential).

global_option.name: --no-install
tip: Disable auto install in the Bun runtime.

global_option.name: --no-orphans
tip: Exit when the parent process dies, and on exit SIGKILL every descendant. Linux/macOS only.

global_option.name: --parallel
tip: Run multiple scripts concurrently with Foreman-style output.

global_option.name: --port
tip: Set the default port for Bun.serve.

global_option.name: --prefer-latest
tip: Use the latest matching versions of packages in the Bun runtime, always checking npm.

global_option.name: --prefer-offline
tip: Skip staleness checks for packages in the Bun runtime and resolve from disk.

global_option.name: --preload
tip: Import a module before other modules are loaded.

global_option.name: --print
tip: Evaluate argument as a script and print the result.

global_option.name: --sequential
tip: Run multiple scripts sequentially with Foreman-style output.

global_option.name: --shell
tip: Control the shell used for package.json scripts.

global_option.name: --smol
tip: Use less memory, but run garbage collection more often.

global_option.name: --throw-deprecation
tip: Determine whether or not deprecation warnings result in errors.

global_option.name: --use-system-ca
tip: Use the system's trusted certificate authorities.

global_option.name: --user-agent
tip: Set the default User-Agent header for HTTP requests.

global_option.name: --watch
tip: Automatically restart the process on file change.

global_option.name: --workspaces
tip: Run a script in all workspace packages (from the "workspaces" field in package.json).

global_option.name: --zero-fill-buffers
tip: Boolean to force Buffer.allocUnsafe(size) to be zero-filled.
